docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,140.00 FILED BY KUSTER GERHARD AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDT PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDT PETER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUSTER GERHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANDT PETER $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, 665 EDDY ST.#37 S.F, CA 94109 PLT&DEFT STIPULATE THAT DEFT.BRANDT WILL HAVE UNTI L OCT.12,1991 TO VACATE THE PREMISES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BRANDT PETER
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21319, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUSTER GERHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRANDT PETER 665 EDDEY ST. JUDGMENT RENDERED IN SUP COURT RENDERED ON 1/21/92 SCA 21319. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
